title: Midbrain organoid astrocyte seeding
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e6ac0","text":"Midbrain organoid media","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fl397","text":"D35+ (Long-Term Media) DMEM/F-12+Glutamax + 13 B-27 minus vitamin A + 13 N-2 + 10 ng/mL BDNF + 10 ng/mL GDNF + 0.2 μM Ascorbic Acid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bhn55","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ijrh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Refer to the publish protocols to obtain the cell materials required. https://www.protocols.io/view/midbrain-organoid-differentiation-in-spinner-flask-rm7vzbnr4vx1/v1 https://www.protocols.io/view/astrocyte-extraction-from-brain-organoids-261ge364wl47/v2
From a 90% confluent plate of astrocytes.
Add 1 mL of TrypLE™ Select Enzyme (1X), no phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #12563011.
Transfer the cells to 15 ml falcon tubes and add 5 ml of media.
Resuspend the cell pellet in 1ml of Astrocyte Medium ScienCell Catalog # #1801
Count the cells using Countess II (Life Technologies, AMQAX1000)
Individually add day 40 midbrain organoids to a Corning 96 well V bottom shape plate.
After a week transfer the organoids to a 96 well plate coated with Geltrex LDEV Free hESC Quality 5 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1413302 1/100 .
creator: gustavo.parfitt Parfitt
